title: How FCNR accounts offer safe, stable returns for NRIs — key features explained
summary: FCNR accounts allow NRIs to invest in foreign currencies, offering tax-exempt interest in India. Loans against these deposits are available, but restrictions apply. Interest rates are competitive, and deposits are fully repatriable, making them a secure investment option.

summary: The Indian ​rupee fell to a record ​low for the third straight session on Monday, ​finding only fleeting relief from the central bank's tightening of banks' forex position caps, as the outlook for Asian currency remained weak amid the Middle ‌East war.

title: Rupee at 95: Worst-case scenario of 100 moves closer; how bad is it for markets?

title: NSE contacts investors for OFS participation in over Rs 20,000 crore IPO: Report
summary: National Stock Exchange of India has taken a key step toward its IPO by issuing an offer-for-sale (OFS) letter to shareholders, formally initiating the listing process. The entire issue will be through OFS, with eligibility limited to those holding shares since June 15, 2025.
